series_metadata.series_title: Health Hazard Assessment of Super Fund
series_metadata.series_description: Contains individual health information, environmental data, contamination information, testing information, test results, related correspondence and travel information documenting site visits and evaluations of Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) design

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 3 years after all on-going investigations are completed. Destroy only after receipt of written permission from Region 5, United States Environmental Protection Agency ; Paper: Retain 3 years after all on-going investigations are completed. Destroy only after receipt of written permission from Region 5, United States Environmental Protection Agency, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
